description_short: Axicon 15000 series linear & 2D Barcode Verifier. Barcode verification for 2D barcodes, Linear Barcodes and DPM codes. ISO 15415, 15416, 29158
description_long: Axicon 15000 series linear & 2D Barcode Verifier. Barcode verification for 2D barcodes, Linear Barcodes and DPM codes. ISO 15415, 15416, 29158

Plugins.name: AIAG GTL - Automotive
Plugins.description: Checks data content of the ‘license plate’ barcode for automotive industry Global Transport Label (encoded using Code 128).

Plugins.name: AI CHECK - All
Plugins.description: Validates Application identifiers (AIs) and data structure content for both GS1-128 and GS1 DataBar Expanded.

Plugins.name: AI DATE - Retail
Plugins.description: Checks that a valid date AI (11, 12, 13, 15, 17, 7003, 8008, or 8101) and its data are present.

Plugins.name: AUS-VARIABLE - Retail
Plugins.description: Displays in-house product, 5-digit price and validation of both check digits (displayed on variable quantity eg cheese and meat products) Unique variant to cover the specific requirements of the Australian and the New Zealand markets.

Plugins.name: BRANDED - Retail
Plugins.description: Displays breakdown of information in UK Branded Variable Measure Consumer Unit EAN-13 codes.

Plugins.name: C39 ASCII - Automotive
Plugins.description: Decodes full ASCII Code 39 barcodes.

Plugins.name: C39 PHARM - Pharmaceutical
Plugins.description: Displays the decoded number for Italian Pharmacode (base 32) Code.

Plugins.name: COMMENTS - All
Plugins.description: Allows for free text to describe or comment on verification results.

Plugins.name: COUPON - Retail
Plugins.description: Displays information on issuer, coupon number and value (Euro and UK) and (USA) provides information on manufacturer, family type, purchase requirement and value.

Plugins.name: DELIVERY DATE - All
Plugins.description: To check that a best-before or use-by date is n days later than the present date.

Plugins.name: EURO COUPON - Retail
Plugins.description: Displays information on issuer, coupon number and value.

Plugins.name: FILE DATA - All
Plugins.description: To read the first line of data from a text file at the moment the scan is made.

Plugins.name: GENERIC VMCU - All
Plugins.description: Allows for any variable measure consumer unit prefix (02, 20 to 29) to be used as basis for checking data content.

Plugins.name: GEN SPEC - Retail
Plugins.description: Describes where a GS1 barcode may be used.

Plugins.name: GTIN - All
Plugins.description: To report whether a barcode contains a GTIN.

Plugins.name: HIBC - Pharmaceutical
Plugins.description: Health Industry Barcode. Validates both primary and secondary HIBC symbols. Checks date identifier and structure of data content.

Plugins.name: INSTORE - Retail
Plugins.description: Displays in-house product reference, 5-digit price and validation of both check digits for in-store variable measure retail items.

Plugins.name: ISBN - Retail
Plugins.description: Displays the original ISBN or ISSN number of book and magazine barcodes, and 5-digit add-on data.

Plugins.name: JOB REF - All
Plugins.description: Allows a single line reference for ISO traceability and spreadsheet information; forms part of the printed report. You can configure a default Job Reference, and also choose to be prompted for a job reference on every scan.

Plugins.name: LENGTH CHECK - All
Plugins.description: Allows for checking of minimum and maximum lengths of Code 39, ITF, Codabar, Code 128, GS1 DataBar, MSI Plessey, and Code 93 symbols.

Plugins.name: LOOKUP - All
Plugins.description: Links to an existing database to show (and print) description of product along with quality control information. Please see Text Lookup below.

Plugins.name: LPPR - Pharmaceutical
Plugins.description: Checks French (Liste des Produits et Prestations Remboursables) LPPR codes as applicable.
